ModuleTitle.helper: Administrator-facing title for this OpenContent module. This helps sync the content block with DNN module settings and is not displayed to visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used to create a page anchor, such as resources-library. Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Main heading shown above the resource list.

SectionDescription.helper: Optional. Short introduction shown above the resource list. HTML is allowed.
SectionDescription.placeholder: Explore videos, organizations, talks, and practices that support mindfulness, stress recovery, and nature-based wellbeing.

Resources.helper: Add each resource here. Resources are grouped by Category on the public page.

Title.helper: Required. The public title of this resource.

Description.helper: Optional. A short plain-language description of why this resource is useful.
Description.placeholder: A collection of videos exploring compassion, altruism, research, and education.

Url.helper: Required. Paste the full website or video URL here.

Category.helper: Choose the group this resource belongs to. Manage this list from the DNN module actions menu using Manage Resource Categories.

ResourceType.helper: Choose the kind of resource. Manage this list from the DNN module actions menu using Manage Resource Types.

IconClass.helper: Optional FontAwesome Free icon class. Examples: fas fa-play-circle, fas fa-leaf, fas fa-brain, fas fa-heart, fas fa-book-open.
